programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Watch Cardinals rookie quarterback Kyler Murray and Falcons QB Matt Ryan duel in an aerial shootout. Both QBs combined for nearly 700 total passing yards and 7 TDs as Arizona toppled Atlanta, 34-33.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Rookie Saquon Barkley runs for a career-high 142 yards and scores three touchdowns as the Giants hold off the Tampa Bay Buccaneers, 38-35.

programme.desc: Rookie Justin Herbert scored on a 1-yard plunge to give the Los Angeles Chargers a 30-27 overtime victory over the Las Vegas Raiders on Thursday night.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: During the Cincinnati Bengals' Week 17 victory over the Kansas City Chiefs (34-31), wide receiver Ja'Marr Chase turned in an impressive stat line: 11 receptions, 266 receiving yards and three touchdowns. With this performance, he rewrote the NFL record for most receiving yards by a rookie in a game.

programme.desc: A man who believed his life was going in the right direction is faced with a decision to either betray the woman he loves or turn on his best friend.

programme.title: The Jackie Robinson Story
programme.desc: This biography of Jackie Robinson portrays the struggles of the first black Major League Baseball player.

programme.title: Hav Faith
programme.desc: A man is elevated to lead a prominent church where issues arise between him, the son of the retiring bishop and a money-hungry real estate broker.

programme.title: Pastor Jones: Samuel & Delia
programme.desc: Haunted by a tragic past and exiled from his community, a pastor loses faith. With nowhere to go, he sets out on a journey to rediscover himself.

programme.title: On the Edge
programme.desc: When a young basketball player entangles himself with drug dealers and ends up with a price on his head, he turns to an ex-cop and his pals for help.

programme.title: Go Tell It on the Mountain
programme.desc: An African American teen has an explosive relationship with his tyrannical religious fanatic stepfather in 1930s Harlem.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: One black and one white woman in 1955 Montgomery, Alabama must decide what they are going to do in response to the famous bus boycott lead by Martin Luther King.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: In this crime-drama starring football superstar Jim Brown, a notorious gangster must reconcile his past in order to make a future for his criminally-minded son.

programme.title: The Killing Secret
programme.desc: A seemingly healthy marriage is threatened by deadly secrets as the couple discovers that smiles can be deceiving, and kisses can be poison.

programme.title: No Love Lost
programme.desc: After finalizing their divorce, Noah and Moriah find themselves going from lovers to roommates.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: A former felon looking for redemption tries to steer inner-city kids away from crime by forming an unconventional chess club in Washington, DC.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: The fierce head of an all-female former gang that broke up gets them in the saddle again to hunt down treasure and avenge her sister’s death.

programme.title: Go Tell It on the Mountain
programme.desc: An African American teen has an explosive relationship with his tyrannical religious fanatic stepfather in 1930s Harlem.

programme.title: Proud
programme.desc: The true story of the segregated USS Mason and its all-African American crew that was just one of two ships to sail into battle against Nazi U-boats.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: In this crime-drama starring football superstar Jim Brown, a notorious gangster must reconcile his past in order to make a future for his criminally-minded son.

programme.title: The Best Thing!
programme.desc: A restaurateur discovers his deceased ex-girlfriend may have had his child.

programme.title: Kingdom Men
programme.desc: Pastor Gerald's job is on the line if he doesn't increase the attendance of the men in the church. He decides to have a men's retreat, hoping it will fix everything. He realizes God has called upon him to help the men in the church.

programme.title: The Temptations
programme.desc: The true story behind the legendary Motown musical sensation is brought to life in this touching miniseries.

programme.title: The Fantastic World of D.C. Collins
programme.desc: A U.N. diplomat's (Bernie Casey) pint-size son (Gary Coleman) plays hero in his daydreams and with spies who are real.

programme.title: False Witness
programme.desc: As their conflicting ideas begin to take a toll on their relationship, an investigator plans to prove his lover, an assistant DA, wrong about a case.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity thrusts a former Special Forces agent suffering from PTSD back into the world of treachery he has tried to leave behind.

programme.title: Cleaver Family Reunion
programme.desc: This year, the delightfully dysfunctional Cleaver family will settle their differences once and for all... with a few misadventures along the way.

programme.title: One Love
programme.desc: A rasta musician meets and falls for a gospel singer when they both enter a music contest in Kingston, Jamaica. However, her father has other ideas.

programme.title: In This House
programme.desc: Claudia, a medical student, is focused on building a perfect life with her live-in boyfriend Dr. Jayson. Her grandfather's death forces her to go back to her hometown to face her estranged family and her past. Once she arrives, she uncovers sinister secrets and will stop at nothing to break the generational curse stemming from her family's history.

programme.title: Kingsmen
programme.desc: Follows the story of the King family, a known crime syndicate. When their patriarch is killed, they fall under the wrath of a rival crime family, as well as the police. The four eldest brothers will do everything they can to protect their family.

programme.title: Meli
programme.desc: Forced to take desperate measures to save her family, a young woman robs a stranger's home, unknowingly targeting someone far more dangerous.

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: Lost and grieving, Chris seeks solace in the wrong crowd. A chance encounter with the enigmatic Patrick leads him down a dangerous path, forcing him to confront his own morality and the consequences of his choices.

programme.title: She's Watching
programme.desc: After finally moving into their dream home together, a young couple finds that they’re being watched every night by an obsessed neighbor.

programme.title: Murder Gardens
programme.desc: Chase trades the safe life his foster dad created for a war on the streets between a notorious crew of drug dealers, corrupt politicians, and the law.

programme.title: You Made Me This Way
programme.desc: Haunted by a failed assassination attempt, ruthless drug lord Kwame becomes obsessed with Aubrey, the woman who nearly ended his life. Consumed by revenge, he kidnaps her, setting in motion a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Deadly Squatters
programme.desc: Eugene and Laura return home from vacation to find two siblings have taken up residence in their home, and are claiming legal rights as squatters. Forced to share their home with strangers, they must figure out how to get out of their own home alive.

programme.title: The Agony and the Ecstasy
programme.desc: When rival gangster Derrick Smith is released from prison, the beef with Armand Rossi explodes into an all-out war in Fountain City, MO. After a hit on his family, Armand goes into killer mode. Derrick and Vic Moore team up for revenge, but Rossi.

programme.title: My Plus Size Bachelorette
programme.desc: Symone, a spirited and vibrant plus-size woman in her 30s, finds herself navigating the unpredictable world of modern dating while grappling with the emotional aftermath of her one-night stand with Andre, her high school sweetheart.

programme.title: Melted Lipstick
programme.desc: Magic comes with a steep price for a shrinking violet who’s given a special lipstick that has the power to transform her into anyone she desires.

programme.title: Wish
programme.desc: Unapologetically promiscuous and fiercely independent, Wish is not a fan of commitment until she meets a woman who changes everything.

programme.title: Triangle Slave
programme.desc: After rising to the top of the drug game in Philadelphia, two brothers find their empire threatened when a woman comes between them.

programme.title: The House on Adams Drive
programme.desc: Sean is convinced the only way to keep the woman of his dreams happy is by obtaining as much money as possible. His friend Kordell, who's an adult film star, helps him with a way to make a lot of money overnight. When they're sent to a house to possibly film a scene, that turns out to be a real life exorcism.

programme.title: The Housekeeper 2
programme.desc: After moving on from her sordid past, Sharease flourishes in her new life and success. When her son Adonis kidnapped, she seeks help from a ghost of her past to rescue him.

programme.title: The Forsaken
programme.desc: A young boy uncovers an old book about two inspiring cowboys and uses their tales in his own life.

programme.title: The Good Sister
programme.desc: Raven moves in with her sister Devin and her husband in Atlanta, where she begins to dig her claws into Devin's life and home, and seducing her husband. Devin must make a choice that could be deadly to save her own life and happiness.

programme.title: Swept
programme.desc: Buried secrets come to light and new relationships develop when five old friends reconnect at their 20-year high school reunion.

programme.title: The Betrayal 5: Kutthroat Fa Eva
programme.desc: Love, power, and revenge fuel the war between two rival gangs. As blood spills and alliances crumble, a forbidden romance continues to spark in the chaos. But the streets are buzzing with questions about the updates with TK!

programme.title: Runway of Shadows
programme.desc: Sisters Ivy and Zara are separated at a very young age due to their father's deceit. When Ivy and Zara unexpectedly cross paths at a prestigious runway show, the stage it set for a series of mysterious and unsettling events.

programme.title: Scarred
programme.desc: Nate meets and hooks up with the beautiful Mia after a night out. Everything is beautiful, until Nate's wife Kamryn discovers his infidelity. The love triangle begins to spiral as everyone is on edge, and that some actions have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Her Last Patient
programme.desc: Dr. Athena Hart thought she had seen every kind of broken soul-until Lucas Morningstar walked into her office. What begins as therapy quickly twists into a deadly game of obsession and revenge.

programme.title: The F.B.I.
programme.desc: A woman convinces her abductor to demand more ransom money.

programme.title: The F.B.I.
programme.desc: A trucking company is suspected of hijacking and arson.

programme.title: The F.B.I.
programme.desc: A former military officer trains two escaped prisoners for the planned hijacking of a Army payroll.

programme.title: The F.B.I.
programme.desc: A former gang member’s friend betrays him to the leader.

programme.title: The F.B.I.
programme.desc: A criminal shoots federal officers and blackmails a playboy.

programme.title: The F.B.I.
programme.desc: After hijackers steal $20 million in travelers' checks, their contact refuses to honor his promise of payment.

programme.title: The F.B.I.
programme.desc: A blind woman, taken hostage by a diamond thief, leaves clues that lead the FBI to the criminal's whereabouts.

programme.title: The F.B.I.
programme.desc: A young man hijacks an armored car using stolen explosives.

programme.title: Alonzo Bodden: Historically Incorrect
programme.desc: The New York native and Last Comic Standing winner examines historical inaccuracies of the past, which have led to our present situation.

programme.title: Andy Woodhull: World's Greatest Stepdad
programme.desc: With five albums and appearances on “Conan'' “Late Late Night,” and Comedy Central, he was the first comic to debut on Jimmy Fallon’s “Tonight Show.”

programme.title: Erica Rhodes: I Love You More
programme.desc: The Comedy Central @midnight and Fox Punchline panelist with the high-pitched voice brings this 40-minute stand-up set to a live audience.

programme.title: Erica Rhodes: La Vie en Rhodes
programme.desc: The stand up sensation performs at the legendary Rose Bowl, discussing annoying quotes, texting etiquette, and the downfall of exes.

programme.title: Natasha Pearl Hansen: I Was Supposed to Get Married Today
programme.desc: The comedian discusses postponing her wedding for the third time, bridal culture, and the craziness surrounding expectations for women.

programme.title: Keep Your Distance
programme.desc: Tony Baker; Keon Polee; Tahir Moore; Brandon Lewis.

programme.title: Keep Your Distance
programme.desc: KevOnStage hosts a night of stand up comedy featuring Tony Baker, Leonard Ouzts, Tacarra Williams, and Dustin Nickerson.

programme.title: Keep Your Distance
programme.desc: Tony Baker; Ryan Davis; Jay "Big Irish" Hollingsworth; CP; Precious Hall; T. Murph.

programme.title: Nick Cannon: Stand-Up, Don't Shoot
programme.desc: Nick Cannon uses his potent voice to rip into society, love, dating and politics. Filmed live at the Ebony Repertory Theatre in South Central LA.

programme.title: Nick Cannon: F--k Nick Cannon
programme.desc: A recent health scare has changed how he sees the world and he is here to share his unique perspective on getting older, raising his children, and living with his famous wife.

programme.title: More Funny Women of a Certain Age
programme.desc: Caroline Rhea headlines a cast of women for a night of uninhibited stand-up comedy; featuring Carol Leifer, Tammy Pescatelli, Thea Vidale, Carole Montgomery, and Julia Scotti.

programme.title: Russell Peters: Deported
programme.desc: The hilarious Russell Peters performs at a stadium in Mumbai where he laments gaining weight, spoofs Bollywood vocals, and talks about being a dad.

programme.title: Tommy Tiernan: Tomfoolery
programme.desc: Fresh off his role on the hit show Derry Girls, Irish comic Tommy Tiernan riffs on everything from medical exams to his failed career as a priest.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: All Over the Map
programme.desc: A comedy set and travelogue by comedian Jeff Dunham as he and his ventriloquist’s dummies perform globally from Iceland and London to Israel.

programme.title: Lavell Crawford: New Look Same Funny! (Extended Edition)
programme.desc: Lavell Crawford, with a new look and new outlook on life, hosts a new standup special.

programme.title: Godfrey: Regular Black
programme.desc: The hilarious, fearless comic discusses college, public transportation, and more in this comedy special performed in his hometown of Chicago.

programme.title: Anjelah Johnson: The Homecoming Show
programme.desc: The comic shares her stories of growing up with a sports enthusiast father who never wanted to pay for athletic training, and other hilarious tales.

programme.title: Jimmy O. Yang: Good Deal
programme.desc: The Silicon Valley star uses his debut stand-up special to discuss tall women, disappointing his parents, and how he learned English from rap videos.

programme.title: Jim Breuer: Let's Clear the Air
programme.desc: The SNL alum, radio host, and film actor clears the air at his live event, chronicling his transformation from oddball child to ultimate family man.

programme.title: Jim Breuer: And Laughter For All
programme.desc: Marriage and parenthood won't keep die-hard metalhead comedian Jim Breuer from losing his manic sense of humor in this hilarious live show.

programme.title: Gabriel Iglesias: I'm Not Fat... I'm Fluffy
programme.desc: The comic known for wearing his signature Hawaiian shirts covers everything from his fondness for Paul Rodriguez to his own "fluffiness."

programme.title: Gabriel Iglesias: Hot and Fluffy
programme.desc: Filmed at the Fox Theater in Bakersfield, California the comedian and well-known favorite to television viewers as being on "Last Comic Standing," performs impressions and silly voices.

programme.title: Gabriel Iglesias: Aloha Fluffy
programme.desc: The comic discusses his crazy world of family, friends, and world travels.

programme.title: Kim McVicar: Please Notice Me
programme.desc: The whip-smart former backup dancer discusses the merits of crawling for rappers, flirting at her father’s funeral, and so much more.

programme.title: Whitney Cummings: Money Shot
programme.desc: Comedy Central roast veteran Whitney Cummings gets the stage to herself in this debut special, which finds the young comedian riffing on a wide range of topics, chiefly the differences between men and women and how both behave in relationships.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Achmed Saves America
programme.desc: The world's most incompetent terrorist finds himself whisked away from his homeland and taken to Americaville, USA.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Arguing With Myself
programme.desc: Join Jeff and his outspoken felt pals: Walter, Peanut, José Jalapeño, Bubba J, and Sweet Daddy Dee for an evening of laughs and observations.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Controlled Chaos
programme.desc: The ventriloquist comedian provides fresh, hilarious material with his favorite puppets; Walter, Peanut, and two brand new characters.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: I'm With Cupid
programme.desc: Ventriloquist and stand-up comedian Jeff Dunham performs an all-Valentine's Day-themed special.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Minding the Monsters
programme.desc: The comedian and ventriloquist extraordinaire, along with this felt friends, visits a haunted house where hilarious chaos ensues.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Unhinged in Hollywood
programme.desc: Previously unseen stand-up comedy by Jeff Dunham; sketches that include popular characters; Brad Paisley performs; special appearances by comic Chris Parnell and former UFC champion Chuck Liddell.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Spark of Insanity
programme.desc: Jeff and his felt friends Walter, Melvin the Superhero Guy, Peanut, and others share their latest and greatest thoughts about our times.

programme.desc: Jonathan Winters returns. Also, "Carol & Sis" plan a surprise party; and Carol is "Mrs. Invisible Man."

programme.desc: Sketches include: "The West Dakota County Fair", "War Is Heck", and another visit with "The Old Folks."

programme.desc: Jack Klugman plays a skeptical man annoyed by his sister-in-law's visiting date--a clairvoyant.

programme.desc: Features Dick as an airport traveller getting a farewell, and Tim as a steelworker seeking to do in his wife.

programme.desc: Tim has to write a eulogy for his best friend. On "As The Stomach Turns", things turn bionic after a funeral.

programme.desc: Rita Moreno guest stars, appearing in a sketch as a nurse. Also featured: Tim as a hapless officer.

programme.desc: Soupy Sales and Carol play a pair of shoppers browsing samples of sexy cologne.

programme.desc: Ken Berry stars with Carol as unsuccessful Western movie stars in "The Saga Of Lily And Billy."

programme.desc: An employee is found dead in a restaurant kitchen. Clues found near the body include an empty cash register, a knife and a trail of blood splotches leading to a vandalized car in the parking lot.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: While in the process of adopting a five-week-old baby, a mother takes him to work with her. While there, the baby inexplicably obtains a skull fracture while unsupervised.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A decomposing body is found in a pond and a tent is found nearby. Dr. G performs the autopsy in the morgue but finds few clues other than fingerprints and mouthwash in the stomach.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: When the husband, Tao Chen, is shot to death by his wife Jun, she claims she pulled the trigger in self-defense when a drunken Tao came after her with a gun.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A man is found dead in a motel room due to multiple shotgun wounds. Dr. G proves the scene isn't what it seems.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: When Dr. G receives Lea Conrad's body, she suspects the woman may have died from an antihistamine overdose. Then, Dr. G learns that Lea was being treated for lupus.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G must figure out if a decomposed body is that of a local missing woman and if she was murdered.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Melissa Riobe's life is ruled by her addiction to drugs. Now, the 42-year-old woman has learned how to buy powerful prescription drugs online without a doctor's note.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A quadriplegic woman loved by her community is found dead in an Orlando park 150ft from her motorized wheelchair. Children find her lifeless body face down in the sand.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It's an early Sunday morning when a local resident decides to take a short-cut through the church parking lot. Walking past a lone car, the resident can't believe his eyes.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It is 3am and Deputy Torres is cruising a Texas highway when he suddenly spots a crushed pick-up truck along the side of the road. Trapped inside is the lifeless body of 24-year-old Luis Reyes.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Recent college grad Robert Terrible is out drinking at a club with friends celebrating. At 3am, he realizes he better call it a night and heads to the nearby garage where he parked his car.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Manny Alvarez mysteriously crashes his car into a fence. He dies en route to the hospital, leaving behind a wife and son. It is up to Dr. G to find out what cut this young man's life short.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: An elderly woman is driving when she's overcome with shooting pains and crashes her car. She's rushed to the hospital, but the doctors find nothing wrong. Can Dr. G find the cause of death?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Rusty Updike has asked his ex-wife Vesta on a cruise. The couple haven't seen each other for 15 years but Vesta decides that a cruise with her ex might make for a nice change of pace.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A 71-year-old man wakes in the middle of the night, gasping for air. Paramedics rush to save him, but it's all in vain: he's dead by the time they arrive. What caused his death?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: After a brief illness, 34-year old Claire Jackson dies suddenly in the hospital from massive liver failure and winds up in Dr. G's morgue.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Teenagers stumble across a horrifying car fire on the side of a desolate stretch of roadway. When the police arrive, they pull severely burned human remains from the driver's seat.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: Doctors struggle to save a young man brought to the ER frozen and pulseless.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A 4lb steel hook impales the skull of construction worker.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A ruptured brain aneurysm threatens to kill the ER's medical director.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: Dr. Michos has his hands full when ten critically ill teenagers are brought in after experimenting with drugs.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A mother and son are brought in after a horrific car accident.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: Two gang members threaten to kill Dr. Carroll while he tries to save three men with gunshot wounds.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A woman comes into the ER with severe abdominal pain and claims there is an alien in her stomach.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A woman gets stuck in a toilet bowl; a man's leg is mangled by a stump grinder; a nurse collapses.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A man dressed as Santa is near death and his wife asks to harvest his semen.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A teen is brought in with a live cockroach stuck in his ear canal, a man slices his hand with a saw and more.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A pregnant ER doctor is endangered by a seemingly invincible violent patient.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A young boy is attacked by a shark and comes close to death as surgeons battle to save his life.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A pregnant woman has a cerebral aneurysm, a man is stabbed in the heart and more.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A doctor opens a nurse's chest and takes her heart in his hand in a desperate effort to save her life.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: Three emergency deliveries in the ER cause a turf war, gunshot victims have a surprising connection and more.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A young man has a 2-inch pipe through his head. A young bride is bleeding uncontrollably.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: Two well-dressed ladies are ready to hit the town but end up in the ER instead.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A boy suffers from a massive brain hemorrhage after being hit by a baseball bat.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A jewelry shop owner is shot point blank in the chest during a robbery.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A car with teen girls crashes into a fence, with a pole shooting through the windshield and into the driver.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A man comes into the ER thinking he's constipated but his condition is life-threatening.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: It's a busy day in the ER as Dr. Heilbron battles to treat a man whose intestine has come out, among others.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A young boy is taken to the ER after being in a horrific accident.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: Doctors are baffled when a stroke patient's heart keeps stopping and restarting without intervention.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER

programme.desc: A pregnant woman's leg pain turns out to be a flesh-eating virus, threatening life and limb.

programme.title: Monty Don's American Gardens
programme.desc: Monty explores the extraordinary scenery of the west coast of America. He begins his journey in Arizona where he learns about cacti and marvels at the sight of them in the desert and in private gardens where they have replaced traditional plants and lawns.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: At Longmeadow Monty is planting bulbs in pots and around the garden for an explosion of spring colour. Carol Klein travels to Yorkshire where she takes a close look at the enormous colour range and form of a late season perennial, the salvia. Mark Lane is in Oxfordshire looking at how ornamental grasses can be used in planting design to create exciting combinations.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: After an extraordinary season, Monty's orchard has a bountiful harvest of apples and he gives advice on how to pick and store them. Frances Tophill makes a final visit to her shared allotment and joins in with the festivities at their annual show. Adam Frost visits the RHS garden Wisley where he meets the Curator to discuss the effects of summer. Nick Bailey investigates knotweed, one of the most pernicious weeds in the UK, Arit Anderson provides inspiration for colourful late season containers.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty tackles three seasons of gardening when he makes additions to his spring garden, gives advice on how to dry and preserve herbs for winter and plants up a container to give interest from now until spring. Carol celebrates one of the plant successes of an extraordinary summer, the Canna while Frances Tophill tackles a viewer's garden and suggests plants which will perform throughout the winter. Toby Buckland visits a garden in Devon with Japanese influences.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: One couple battle to turn a clay-clogged building site in Sussex into a piece of Portugal. Another tackle a forest of overgrowth in their new back garden in Cadeby. They are determined to create a productive space, something they have always wanted.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: A truck driver from Wakefield with a passion for flowers wants to create a perfect outside space for his girlfriend and burgeoning family, while in Swindon a widow wants to find the best way of turning her bleak patch of green into a cottage garden.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty travels to two corners of the country where the challenges he faces are very different. On the south coast he is presented with a front garden ravaged by salty winds, and in Snowdonia he helps a mountainside garden.

programme.title: Monty Don's Spanish Gardens
programme.desc: Monty travels across Central Spain. He begins at the vast, imposing palace and garden of the Escorial before heading for Madrid, Toledo, other parts of Castile and finally Valencia.

programme.title: Monty Don's Spanish Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don is in the south of Spain, visiting gardens that show how this part of the country has evolved thanks to influences from visitors and settlers from ancient to modern times.

programme.title: Monty Don's Spanish Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don travels across northern Spain, visiting gardens across this vast and diverse landscape that changes from an Atlantic to a Mediterranean climate as he journeys from Galicia to Catalonia.

programme.title: Monty Don's French Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don visits some of the most famous and interesting gardens in France. Here, he tells the stories behind France's important historic gardens. These include elaborate walled gardens designed to please the mistress - and then the wife - of a King, and magnificent displays of flowers and fountains that involved thousands of soldiers moving tracts of land and incited violent jealousy in another monarch.

programme.title: Monty Don's French Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don turns to the French love of food and finds out how this has influenced their gardens. He travels to some of the most famous `potager' or kitchen gardens, where vegetables and flowers are planted together in elaborate and beautiful displays. He also talks to gardeners about this style of planting which has been copied the world over.

programme.title: Monty Don's French Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don travels to some of the most celebrated artists' gardens, including the one created by the impressionist Claude Monet, who planted and painted his garden for half his life. Monty also matches the paintings to the garden of Paul Cezanne, as well as visiting several contemporary artistic gardens to see how the use of plants and trees has evolved into new and varied styles.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Frances Tophill reveals some exciting news. After years of dreaming, she finally has her very own garden and can't wait to share her plans and get to grips with bringing this compact space to life.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty is busy planting umbellifers and making some changes to the dry garden. He also sows peas and pots on his dahlias. Carol reveals exciting plans for an ambitious show garden she's designing for the RHS Hampton Court Palace Garden Festival.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Adam visits a walled garden in Somerset to meet a group of volunteers who are gardening alongside those who need help to transform their lives. At Longmeadow, Monty creates two different planting schemes for pots for shady spaces, transplants grasses in the jewel garden, and plants out his favourite varieties of tomatoes.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: A special programme from the first big flower show of the season, the RHS Malvern Spring Festival. Rachel de Thame and Nick Bailey explore show gardens packed full of ideas and discover the newest varieties of plants and flowers that are hot off the potting bench. There are the herb specialists from Gloucestershire who believe that edibles are just as important as ornamentals in the garden, and a nursery famed for its foxgloves that also has an impressive collection of tree peonies.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty is busy planting out tropical gingers and sweetcorn and direct sowing beans. Joe Swift visits a stunning walled garden in Denbighshire, and Rekha Mistry shares the secrets of growing aubergines.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty creates colourful planting schemes with trailing plants. He also plants out cabbages in the vegetable garden and shares a clever tip for dealing with spent tulips. Toby Buckland revels in the displays of roses at Mount Ephraim Gardens in Kent.

programme.title: Monty Don's Adriatic Gardens
programme.desc: Monty travels to Europe and explores the influence of the Venetians on gardening. To begin with, he explores Venice on one of the city's famous barges, stepping out to visit green spaces large and small that are often hidden from view behind high walls.

programme.title: Monty Don's Adriatic Gardens
programme.desc: Monty begins in the city of Trieste, close to Italy's border with Croatia, to visit a public garden first created by an obsessive royal plantsman more than 150 years ago, which is now being carefully restored. He then heads down the Adriatic coast through Croatia to pick up the trail that the Venetians followed, ending his journey on the beautiful island of Lopud, near Dubrovnik.

programme.title: Monty Don's Adriatic Gardens
programme.desc: Monty begins the last leg of his journey in Corfu, a Greek island with strong Venetian links, including olive trees planted by them that are still grown today. Here, Monty visits a spectacular garden made by an Englishman with Greek connections.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: In the cottage garden, Monty is moving a rose which has outgrown its space and in the vegetable garden he gives advice on what to plant now for spring. He also finds out more about the mysterious world of earthworms and discovers why they are vital for the garden.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: At Longmeadow Monty is planting bulbs in pots and around the garden for an explosion of spring colour. Carol Klein travels to Yorkshire where she takes a close look at the enormous colour range and form of a late season perennial, the salvia. Mark Lane is in Oxfordshire looking at how ornamental grasses can be used in planting design to create exciting combinations.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Featuring advice on how to plant spring flowering perennials for instant impact and recommendations for planting bare root roses full of fragrance in borders and pots. Monty will also begin planning the vegetable garden for the year ahead.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty helps two families create dream gardens that are as much for the children as for the adults. In Doncaster, Nikki and John want a garden full of edible plants and fruit.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty faces some of the most surprising plans yet - a Norwegian garden complete with waterfalls to be fashioned out of a tiny back yard in Dorset, and nothing less than a Japanese tea garden to be created out of a patch of ground in Bromley.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty Don is asked to rescue two nightmare outside spaces. In Salisbury, newly engaged Glenn and Zoe want a brand new garden and most of all they are desperate to produce flowers for their wedding. Currently their steeply sloping garden is completely unusable.

programme.title: Monty Don's Paradise Gardens
programme.desc: In Morocco, Monty discovers the wide variety of paradise gardens. He begins just outside the city of Marrakesh in an enormous royal walled meadow, The Agdal. From there he moves to the heart of the town where he comes upon a tiny garden where huge banana plants jostle with palms to create a secret paradise garden, a shelter from the busy world outside. And in another part of the city a rundown old palace has been turned into a stunning contemporary garden with a twist.

programme.title: Monty Don's Paradise Gardens
programme.desc: In Turkey Monty is dazzled by an extraordinary display of the Ottoman Empire's favourite flower, the tulip, and learns of its sacred significance. Travelling further East to India he encounters a new type of spirituality in the tomb gardens of the Mughal Empire. Stunning mausoleums were set in vast gardens as places where an earthly king could enter a divine paradise.

programme.title: Kew on a Plate
programme.desc: It is spring at Kew and after a long, dark winter, nature is coming back to life. Raymond makes his sublime version of rhubarb and custard and Kate finds out how a 12-year-old slave enabled vanilla to become the world's most popular flavour.

programme.title: Kew on a Plate
programme.desc: Summer has arrived at Kew and everything in Raymond Blanc and Kate Humble's garden is blooming. Butterflies and bees abound and there are new crops to tend, harvest and cook with. Everyone loves a carrot, particularly the carrot fly, so Raymond must protect his crop to ensure he has a good supply for his summer carrot stew.

programme.title: Kew on a Plate
programme.desc: It's autumn at Kew and the vegetable garden is set to produce a bumper harvest. Raymond Blanc and Kate Humble grow some autumnal favourites and cook them up. Kate finds out why the tomato was once considered to be a deadly poison.

programme.title: Kew on a Plate
programme.desc: The end of the year at Kew is fast approaching, winter is setting in, but some crops positively love the cold and Raymond learns how brassicas cope in this frosty season. Kate visits Kew's Millennium Seed Bank.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Featuring Ramona Jones, who was diagnosed with autism in her twenties and discovered how she can find her true identity when she's in the garden. Meanwhile, Monty makes some changes to his pots in the Jewel Garden, harvests gooseberries and plants out squash.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: The team are Birmingham-bound for the annual Gardeners' World Live event. Monty Don, Arit Anderson, Adam Frost, Sue Kent, Carol Klein, Joe Swift, Rachel de Thame and Frances Tophill present the best the gardening world has to offer.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: It is Mark Peterson’s third day in Mexico hunting for a Mexican Texanus Whitetail. After bagging two big bucks in just two days with his new Gunwerks Nexus 300 PRC, he is now moving to a new farm where a giant 12-point buck has often been seen in the southeast corner of the property. It’s the coldest day since he arrived, which typically means the deer will be more active. He is thrilled at the prospect of what could be the best day yet. If everything goes well, they will spend the evening hunting hogs from the high rack.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark is wrapping up his Argentina hunt and heading to Entre Rios to track down the final two birds on his list: the Rock Pigeon and the Eared Dove. This area is home to over 10 million birds, making it a prime hunting ground. With flocks of pigeons and doves filling the skies, Mark is set for a fast-paced, action-packed finish to his hunt—a perfect end to an unforgettable adventure.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Join Mark Peterson as he heads to Kentucky for the late muzzleloader season. Already having an unforgettable season so far after taking “Freak Show” back in early September, he is looking to cap off his Kentucky season with a great buck with his Muzzleloader.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues his hunt in Mexico for a Mexican Texanus Whitetail. On day one, Mark connected with a great management buck, making this buck the first Mexican Texanus Whitetail with his rifle. As temperatures drop and bucks become more active each passing day, he eagerly anticipates an action-packed evening ahead.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues his journey toward the North America Deer Slam — this time deep in the rugged mountains of North Central Mexico. In pursuit of one of the smallest and rarest Whitetail subspecies, the elusive Mexican Central Plateau Whitetail, Mark faces harsh terrain, high elevations, and the challenge of locating a deer that few hunters have ever seen, let alone taken.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark Peterson and Earl Peterson are headed down to Kentucky for the opening of deer season. With this being the earliest that a bowhunter can hunt whitetails, it can result in a giant velvet whitetail harvest. After a fun night enjoying the Swon Brothers' music, it's time to dial the bow in, freshen up the Buck Bourbon at feed sites and hope that Brows or Kevins' buck show themselves. How will the story end on the Giant Deer named Brows?

programme.title: Breaking Boundaries
programme.desc: With the fall transition just about to happen, JP finds the fishing very tough as the bass are still in transition.

programme.title: Breaking Boundaries
programme.desc: JP brings BASS Elite Series angler Cooper Gallant down to Tropic Star Lodge to target Mahi Mahi run n gun style.

programme.title: Breaking Boundaries
programme.desc: JP finds the Largemouth Bass keyed into only one specific pattern this mid fall day.

programme.title: Breaking Boundaries
programme.desc: JP heads back into Florida Bay with Captain Richard Black in search of Redfish, Snook and whatever else they run into using all artificial baits.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Mike Pentecost breaks away for a morning hunt in Alabama. Turkeys are gobbling on a perfect morning, but sometimes things just don't go as planned.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Mike is back after em in Alabama and finally finds a tone that this ol gobbler seems to like. Some timely calling and waiting patiently for this longbeard and his hen to make their way to his setup pays off. Back to work Mike, we have calls to make! It's the WoodHaven Way!

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Colten & Mark Scroggins is in Oklahoma during the peak rut, chasing mature whitetail bucks! With bucks on the move and searching for does, it's the perfect time to break out the calls. Watch as Mark and Colten pull out all the stops—getting aggressively loud with the WoodHaven "Intimidator" Grunt Call—to turn a cruising buck and bring him right into bow range at the blind.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Mike and Billy are changing things up a bit and head to South Georgia to hunt longbeards with the guys from In the South Outdoors. Anytime you get in the turkey woods with Bill Yargus, you are guaranteed to hear some jam up calling. It takes a couple of different setups but they finally get in this ol gobblers "bubble". Oh, did we mention he's a stud!

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: World Champion caller Billy Yargus is hunting his home state of Missouri. Billy is a student of the outdoors and spends countless hours calling and observing birds in the off season. He has a good bead on several gobblers on the backside of the farm but as we all know, turkeys are going to be turkeys. A new setup on a mid-morning gobbler, some timely calling and a lot of patience payoff big for Billy. Trust your scouting info and your gut.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Jeff & Cole of Buckventures TV, are back in Oklahoma with one big goal—catching up with the buck they call “That 170.” With a cold front rolling in, they waste no time hanging stands and getting in position for the action. Jeff breaks out the WoodHaven Intimidator grunt call and sets the stage with a decoy, hoping to pull the giant into bow range.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Long time friends Mike and Danny find a hot top water bite.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Captiva island is the land of giants. Snook, permit and tarpon are on today’s agenda.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Capt. Mike fishes from safety harbor with Capt. Mikey Rogal for the coveted inshore slam.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Mike heads to one of the most prolific fisheries in SW Florida; South Seas Island Resort.

programme.desc: CA heads to the space coast for a mixed bag of drum.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: CA fishes the ultra shallow ponds in Flagler beach for reds and snook.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: Tanner and CA put their power fishing skills to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Captain's Log

programme.title: Fly Shop Tour
programme.desc: With Montana in the rearview mirror the Flylords team crosses over into Idaho. In this leg of the trip they hit Blue-Ribbon trout waters with the folks from Henrys Fork Anglers and Silver Creek Outfitters. They also have a chance to sit down with the owners of these operations and hear what these shops and fly fishing mean to them. Before they hit the road to Utah the crew joins in on another conservation event at Payette Brewing Company.

programme.title: Fly Shop Tour
programme.desc: It’s the final leg of the Fly Shop Tour and what better way to end it than with a trip down to see the crew at Fly Fish Food. We learn the unique story of how owners Clark “Cheech” Pierce & Curtis Fry started their shop and spend some time chasing hungry Cutthroat. Wrapping it all up the team puts on the final conservation event of the season with Fly Fish Food and Fish For Garbage, as well as spending some time behind the oars on the Green River with crew at Western Rivers Fly Shop.

programme.title: TRP
programme.desc: On today's episode of How 2 Tuesday I discuss the importance of wire knots and how they can help you catch some of the gnarliest fish you have seen. With just this one knot learn everything you need to succeed. Come back next week to learn how to tie these knots to liters and mono line!Watch now to enhance your skills and improve your fishing game! programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: WoodHaven’s Josh Anderson heads to the Western Plains of Kansas in pursuit of a mature whitetail buck. Because of the wide open terrain, a decoy and blind calling can be very affective because of the visibility. After a few well-timed grunts on the Intimidator grunt call, a shooter buck shows up right at the base of the tree!

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Champion caller Scott Ellis is in South Florida Osceola country! They are hunting a small oak head adjacent to an orange grove. The thick cover means you have to be setup perfectly, which is a guessing game and will test your patience. Tons of gobbling and turkey action but Scott has to get sneaky to get this old longbeard to break and come in close.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy and his son, Logan visit the beautiful country of New Zealand. From visiting Vineyards and sampling wine, to helicopter hunts for Himalayan Tahr, this episode is everything that is a hunters dream. As well as harvesting the wild game New Zealand has to offer Andy also learns about the importance of the conservation efforts that hunting has in this country from locals in which he spends time with.
Follow the founders: Joe Miles of Asio Gear and Andrae D’Acquisto of Lone Wolf Custom Gear as they hunt big bucks in Iowa, Texas and Mexico!

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
programme.desc: In the wide world of western big game, pronghorn antelope hunting in Wyoming is unmatched in its accessibility and excitement. It’s an active pursuit, typically ripe with plenty of opportunities to spot and stalk black-horned bucks. This makes it an ideal forum for riflemen looking to scratch their western itch.

programme.title: Pure Hunting
programme.desc: Willi and Tom Petry meet in Iowa with good friends, the Wrights to hunt turkeys on their farms. Willi and Tom drew the first season in Iowa and had the first kick at the cat for the spring. They had hunted deer with Cody and Cassie but neither had hunted turkeys in Iowa. They are hoping for a little luck with the gobblers, and they know they are going to have a good time trying.

programme.title: Pure Hunting
programme.desc: Willi spends 8 days chasing a few bucks, but has sights set on “High Beam”. After a few encounters and one on his last morning, he hopes for last minute success on his last afternoon.

programme.title: Bearded Buck
programme.desc: In this episode, Jerry and Austin are joined by Kirk Shebrine and his close friend Scott as they head back to the Cornhusker state to hunt turkeys. They've called in a ton of turkeys over the years but this time they're using a reaping decoy to try to get up close and personal with these Nebraskan long beards. This is a method that they've never tried before and with new methods, comes new challenges.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma getting the Oklahoma turkey season kicked off.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The crew is all at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma kicking of the 2024 Rifle season.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Michael Pitts and Anthony Virga join Realtree Spring Thunder producer Matt Garger to turkey hunt on his home turf in New York's Adirondack Mountains.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: The crew makes it to Oklahoma. Unfortunately, the weather is not in their favor, but that doesn't slow them down. The morning breaks light, and the crew hears dozens of gobbles.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Spring in Michigan means turkey season is on. In this episode of Winchester Life, the crew returns for Turkey Camp 2025, where changing weather, early mornings, and vocal birds set the tone for the week. After dialing in their setups at the range, the team heads into the field to chase gobblers across hardwoods and open farmland. From patient sits at sunrise to midday moves and carefully planned decoy strategies, each hunt brings new challenges and opportunities. Close encounters, tough conditions, and well-timed shots highlight the grind of spring turkey hunting, as the crew makes the most of every chance in the Michigan woods.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting
programme.desc: With bucks on their feet and chasing does, Dan puts his skills and his muzzleloader to the test, hoping to connect with a true Sooner State giant.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Join Mark Peterson as he heads to Kentucky for the late muzzleloader season. Already having an unforgettable season so far after taking “Freak Show” back in early September, he is looking to cap off his Kentucky season with a great buck with his Muzzleloader.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues his hunt in Mexico for a Mexican Texanus Whitetail. On day one, Mark connected with a great management buck, making this buck the first Mexican Texanus Whitetail with his rifle. As temperatures drop and bucks become more active each passing day, he eagerly anticipates an action-packed evening ahead.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We’re kicking off a special weekend at Legends Ranch in Bitely, Michigan — bringing together two groups connected by a shared respect for the outdoors. Legends Ranch has always stood forstrong conservation values, and when you combine that with the work being done by the SCI Foundation and Sables, it sets the tone for something bigger than just a hunt. Sables members are deeply involved in shaping the future of hunting — reaching intoclassrooms, working with young people, collaborating with wildlife professionals, and engaging leaders at both the state and national level. Their efforts are centered on helping others understand wildlife diversity, the principles behind the North American Model of Wildlife Conservation, and the role hunting plays in maintainingbalance in the wild. They’re also helping keep the tradition alive — showing that hunting still has a strong place in today’s culture and communities. With that kind of purpose behind it, this weekend is about more than time in the field — it’s about continuing something that matters.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: From time to time you have moments that will change the way think about something. That is what happened for us while hunting the Scimitar Oryx with Republic Outdoors. Hunting is more than harvesting animals, it’s conservation, and in this story, we learn how a species nearly extinct gets another chance to live.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy and his son, Logan visit the beautiful country of New Zealand. From visiting Vineyards and sampling wine, to helicopter hunts for Himalayan Tahr, this episode is everything that is a hunters dream. As well as harvesting the wild game New Zealand has to offer Andy also learns about the importance of the conservation efforts that hunting has in this country from locals in which he spends time with.

programme.title: HUnting Land Man
programme.desc: On this episode of Hunting Land Man Season 3, Slade puts in some early summer farm work to Ensure his target bucks are well fed! Slade also Talks about his Target buck for the year, "Pope"! Slade is laying the trap early in hopes "Pope" makes a mistake early!

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: In this episode, Slade goes over what he’s doing at his home property to create summer food plots for deer, and gives tips to those looking to do the same. On the final hunt for the 2024 season, Lori gets a big Wilkinson County gobbler.

programme.title: LBP Spotlight
programme.desc: Meet Ryan, a seasoned St. Petersburg guide, fighting tides, time, and the last great tarpon run of the season.

programme.title: LBP Spotlight
programme.desc: Meet Captain Lionel James — a respected Destin, Florida guide known for his upbeat personality, strong community ties, and love for fitness when he’s not on the water.

programme.title: LBP Spotlight
programme.desc: He’s the original fishing coach. From the helm of one of the most iconic inshore shows ever made, Captain C.A. Richardson has taught a generation how to fish. This documentary dives into his story. The man, the mission, and the waters that made him who he is.

programme.title: LBP Spotlight
programme.desc: LBP Spotlights Internet Personality and YouTube Star Lawson Lindsey as he searches for trophy fish at the Headwaters of the Loxahatchee River.

programme.title: HUnting Land Man
programme.desc: Slade and the crew are finally able to catch up with these elk despite some pretty terrible weather conditions. It comes right down to the wire! Don’t miss it.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: On this episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade, Ryan and Bearcub take on the midwest! After some tough hunting, the group is able to make a move to get in position on a BIG midwestern gobbler! Bearcub was able to harvest him after working the bird for almost 45 minutes! Slade and Ryan also do some Pre-Deer season work, and establish where the fall food-plots will be!

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: In this episode Slade and the old Trained Assassins (TAT) crew head to Montrose, Colorado where they meet up with Slade’s dad, Bear Cub, TJ, and George for a heck of a week at Elk Camp. This is all going on now on Hunting Land Man TV.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: Batter Batter Swing………. Well, you might see where this might be headed. But, Hey!! Slade is in the great state of Kansas. Its mid-October and hes looking to bring home Lori some extra home décor.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: A Southwest Mississippi GIANT “Barry” has Slade’s brain in scrambles as he is preparing to head to Iowa after waiting 5 years to finally draw his tag. The chase is on let’s see if the Hunting Land Man can seal a deal!

programme.title: Fly Shop Tour
programme.desc: This episode we make our way through Georgia, where we stop in Helen, Alpharetta and Atlanta!!

programme.title: Fly Shop Tour
programme.desc: This episode we make our way through South Carolina, where we stop in Clemson, Travelers Rest and Charleston!!

programme.title: Fly Shop Tour
programme.desc: This episode we make our way through Florida, where we stop in Jacksonville, Jupiter, Boca Raton and Miami!!

programme.title: Fly Shop Tour
programme.desc: This episode we make our way through Florida, where we stop in Key West, Marathon, Bonita Springs, and Sanibel Island.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Follow TTHA President/CEO Christina Pittman and her husband Matt this week as they tag along side Dr. James Kroll for his annual deer day! This is a great opportunity to learn from one of the best. We are blessed to be able to share his knowledge with other like minded outdoor enthusiasts.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We are blessed today to hunt with Cole Dutton for the Inaugural Pierce Dutton Memorial Hunt. We are honored to spend a weekend with Cole and his family at the G2 Ranch. Disabled Outdoorsman has played a huge part in getting those less fortunate outdoors. We are truly blessed to be able to follow along and capture these great moments.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: John Sewell has played a huge part in the development of feeding Fortified Cottonseed 365 days a year. Laramie Barrett of Fortified Cottonseed joins John for a great weekend of hunting at his ranch in Uvalde, Texas. This is a great time for Laramie to get away from the office and see the first hand of how their product is performing.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: In 2010, Amberly Snyder’s life changed forever when an accident left her paralyzed from the waist-down. Her comeback story not unlike something you’d see in a movie…in fact it inspired one. Disabled Outdoorsmen USA contacted TTHA and set up this hunt and we were fortunate enough to be able to capture just some of Amberly’s story and her harvest of a beautiful Axis buck at the G2 Ranch in the spring of 2022.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Each year we get to spend time in camp with some of our best friends. Zach from Big & J gets some time in a blind while reflecting on what hunting in Texas means to him. Texas provides a wide variety of game, and chasing these creatures all across the state is some of the best times had.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: From time to time you have moments that will change the way think about something. That is what happened for us while hunting the Scimitar Oryx with Republic Outdoors. Hunting is more than harvesting animals, it’s conservation, and in this story, we learn how a species nearly extinct gets another chance to live.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: This week we are rolling along side the crew from Double T Outfitters. Management plays a huge role in every outfitters success every year. Bret and his team have a strong management plan in place and these guys had a blast with a group of out of state hunters.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: This is the story of how FE Hill ranch got it's start. From its inception, FE Hill has created opportunities for people to experience the outdoors and create memories. For us, it has created a tradition of Fathers and Sons hunting together.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: A recap of this season's favorite fish!

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: Capt. Blair meets up with Capt. Ron Ryals to fish the phosphate pits of Bienville outdoors, an amazing spot for hunting and trophy bass catching.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: Capt. Blair goes back to Marco Island with Capt. Chris Broome to tackle the beautiful inshore spots before heading offshore the next day.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: Capt. Blair Wiggins heads out the farthest he’s ever been offshore with Capt. Mike Avanon & Capt. Chris Broome in search of a species he’s never caught before.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: Kyle Green is joined by his childhood friends in his home state of Michigan for a trout fishing adventure. They visit the most dynamic landmarks in the Upper Peninsula, do a little cliff jumping, and finish out the trip cooking trout riverside.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: Kyle and Jeff dive into the wild waters off Hawaii’s coast, coming face-to-face with sharks and graceful manta rays. The adrenaline peaks when Kyle takes a heart-pounding leap off a towering 40-foot cliff, making this adventure as daring as it is unforgettable.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: Kyle and Jeff explore the breathtaking Waipio Valley, the Hawaiian "Valley of the Kings," in search of prawns and bullfrogs. Their adventure continues up a massive volcano, hunting invasive rams, before ending with a feast of native fish paired with island fruits and spices.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: Kyle and Jeff hear about the dangers of fishing for Bluefin Tuna in the Atlantic Ocean from locals in Gloucester, Massachusetts. Then they head 30 miles out onto the open ocean with Darrin of Reel Respect Charters in the hopes of landing their own giant.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Phillip Culpepper heads to Maryland to turkey hunt with Camospace Sweepstakes winner Brian Niblett. After have a gobbler slip away off the roost the guys only have a few more hours to get it done before the noon hunting cutoff.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Low turkey population densities and the rocky, steep terrain of New York State's Adirondack Mountains create a unique spring turkey hunting challenge only found in this region of the country. It's not always easy to find wild turkeys here, but when you can, there is always the chance that this bird has never been hunted making success particularly special.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Phillip Culpepper gets some trigger time in Maryland. He hopes to tag his first Maryland longbeard. Culpepper also calls in a hen and she puts on a show. Follow along as the action unfolds.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Spring Thunder continues to roll across New York State turkey hunting public land gobblers!! After using OnX to find a large tract of public land along the shores of an Adirondack Mountain lake, the guys load up the boat to try and strike up a gobbling turkey.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Spring Thunder heads to Oklahoma to hunt CRAZY springtime gobbler action.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: While getting ready for the 2023 turkey season, we couldn't help but look back at some of the best "off-the-roost" turkey hunts from our video vault. Check out these Team Realtree turkey hunts.

programme.title: Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation
programme.desc: “Part of our responsibility as citizens in this country is to make sure we not only take care of these resources but we hand it off to the next generation in better condition that we found it.” -Bob Ziehmer, Senior Director of Conservation for Bass Pro Shops & Cabela's Join Bob in New Mexico as he talks about taking care of our natural resources for future generations. Special thanks to Express UU Bar Ranch

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: We return to the Ellie B and head a hundred miles offshore to repeat last year’s epic tuna bite. But someone must have brought a banana on board because the plan suddenly turned into an unexpected adventure.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: Capt. Justin and some good ol’ boys get a lesson in angling skills when the captain's wife takes them to school during a trip offshore.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: In our 100th episode we look back and detail a true labor of love. Discussing the fun and challenges learning and adapting to fishing & filming the amazing fishery surrounding Panama City Beach.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: PCB’s white sand beaches are jam-packed with visitors soaking up sunand surf while Justin and Meredith chase schools of migrating tarponjust offshore. How often do those two worlds collide?

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Dan Cabela explains the domestic trade in exotic wildlife and how some of our planet’s most threatened species are being protected by the practice.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Facing extinction in recent history, Dan Cabela investigates the conservation model behind the recovery of alligator populations in the heart of Florida.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Dan Cabela joins conservationists in unraveling the complexity of human wildlife conflict and the reality of living with Africa’s apex predator - the Lion. While the Cabela Family Foundation undertakes the largest ever lion translocation.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Hunter’s dollars play a vital role in the conservation efforts of wild sheep populations. Dan Cabela joins a team of researchers to capture and test a population of Bighorn Sheep for disease, as well as pursuing a ram of his own.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: Ralph’s Iowa buck dreams come true, in a big way, in the last hour of his hunt.

programme.title: Sail Kings
programme.desc: Capt. Jared travels to Venice, Louisiana, where the Mississippi River meets the Gulf, joining Capt. Garrett George and Capt. Jesse Leboeuf for an action-packed offshore adventure in pursuit of Redfish and Tuna.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: Capt. Justin Leake joins some old friends on board the Fall Line in hopes of scoring big in the Bay Point Billfish Open. This trip will test the limits of all the anglers as the skilled captain and crew do the impossible in hopes of bringing home the prize.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Saltwater Experience Charters’ Captain Garrett Stephens for a trip into the Gulf. When their catches get repeatedly cut off, they decide to bring the massive bull sharks up to the surface for a closer look.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: After wrestling with some massive bull sharks, Captains Tom Rowland, Rich Tudor and guest Captain Garrett Stephens encounter some crazy cobia action and it takes all their strength and skill to keep them away from the sharks.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: It is Mark Peterson’s third day in Mexico hunting for a Mexican Texanus Whitetail. After bagging two big bucks in just two days with his new Gunwerks Nexus 300 PRC, he is now moving to a new farm where a giant 12-point buck has often been seen in the southeast corner of the property. It’s the coldest day since he arrived, which typically means the deer will be more active. He is thrilled at the prospect of what could be the best day yet. If everything goes well, they will spend the evening hunting hogs from the high rack.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark is wrapping up his Argentina hunt and heading to Entre Rios to track down the final two birds on his list: the Rock Pigeon and the Eared Dove. This area is home to over 10 million birds, making it a prime hunting ground. With flocks of pigeons and doves filling the skies, Mark is set for a fast-paced, action-packed finish to his hunt—a perfect end to an unforgettable adventure.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Join Mark Peterson as he heads to Kentucky for the late muzzleloader season. Already having an unforgettable season so far after taking “Freak Show” back in early September, he is looking to cap off his Kentucky season with a great buck with his Muzzleloader.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues his hunt in Mexico for a Mexican Texanus Whitetail. On day one, Mark connected with a great management buck, making this buck the first Mexican Texanus Whitetail with his rifle. As temperatures drop and bucks become more active each passing day, he eagerly anticipates an action-packed evening ahead.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues his journey toward the North America Deer Slam — this time deep in the rugged mountains of North Central Mexico. In pursuit of one of the smallest and rarest Whitetail subspecies, the elusive Mexican Central Plateau Whitetail, Mark faces harsh terrain, high elevations, and the challenge of locating a deer that few hunters have ever seen, let alone taken.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark Peterson and Earl Peterson are headed down to Kentucky for the opening of deer season. With this being the earliest that a bowhunter can hunt whitetails, it can result in a giant velvet whitetail harvest. After a fun night enjoying the Swon Brothers' music, it's time to dial the bow in, freshen up the Buck Bourbon at feed sites and hope that Brows or Kevins' buck show themselves. How will the story end on the Giant Deer named Brows?

programme.title: Breaking Boundaries
programme.desc: With the fall transition just about to happen, JP finds the fishing very tough as the bass are still in transition.

programme.title: Breaking Boundaries
programme.desc: JP brings BASS Elite Series angler Cooper Gallant down to Tropic Star Lodge to target Mahi Mahi run n gun style.

programme.title: Breaking Boundaries
programme.desc: JP finds the Largemouth Bass keyed into only one specific pattern this mid fall day.

programme.title: Breaking Boundaries
programme.desc: JP heads back into Florida Bay with Captain Richard Black in search of Redfish, Snook and whatever else they run into using all artificial baits.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Mike Pentecost breaks away for a morning hunt in Alabama. Turkeys are gobbling on a perfect morning, but sometimes things just don't go as planned.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Mike is back after em in Alabama and finally finds a tone that this ol gobbler seems to like. Some timely calling and waiting patiently for this longbeard and his hen to make their way to his setup pays off. Back to work Mike, we have calls to make! It's the WoodHaven Way!

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Colten & Mark Scroggins is in Oklahoma during the peak rut, chasing mature whitetail bucks! With bucks on the move and searching for does, it's the perfect time to break out the calls. Watch as Mark and Colten pull out all the stops—getting aggressively loud with the WoodHaven "Intimidator" Grunt Call—to turn a cruising buck and bring him right into bow range at the blind.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Mike and Billy are changing things up a bit and head to South Georgia to hunt longbeards with the guys from In the South Outdoors. Anytime you get in the turkey woods with Bill Yargus, you are guaranteed to hear some jam up calling. It takes a couple of different setups but they finally get in this ol gobblers "bubble". Oh, did we mention he's a stud!

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: World Champion caller Billy Yargus is hunting his home state of Missouri. Billy is a student of the outdoors and spends countless hours calling and observing birds in the off season. He has a good bead on several gobblers on the backside of the farm but as we all know, turkeys are going to be turkeys. A new setup on a mid-morning gobbler, some timely calling and a lot of patience payoff big for Billy. Trust your scouting info and your gut.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Jeff & Cole of Buckventures TV, are back in Oklahoma with one big goal—catching up with the buck they call “That 170.” With a cold front rolling in, they waste no time hanging stands and getting in position for the action. Jeff breaks out the WoodHaven Intimidator grunt call and sets the stage with a decoy, hoping to pull the giant into bow range.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Long time friends Mike and Danny find a hot top water bite.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Captiva island is the land of giants. Snook, permit and tarpon are on today’s agenda.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Capt. Mike fishes from safety harbor with Capt. Mikey Rogal for the coveted inshore slam.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Mike heads to one of the most prolific fisheries in SW Florida; South Seas Island Resort.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: CA heads to the space coast for a mixed bag of drum.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: CA fishes the ultra shallow ponds in Flagler beach for reds and snook.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: Tanner and CA put their power fishing skills to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: CA heads to Jupiter to fish with Ryan Nitz for giant snook.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Captains Jonathan Moss and Chris Shultz head offshore out of Mayport, Florida in search of massive Red Snapper!

programme.title: Captain's Log

programme.title: Captain's Log

programme.title: Captain's Log

programme.title: Fly Shop Tour
programme.desc: With Montana in the rearview mirror the Flylords team crosses over into Idaho. In this leg of the trip they hit Blue-Ribbon trout waters with the folks from Henrys Fork Anglers and Silver Creek Outfitters. They also have a chance to sit down with the owners of these operations and hear what these shops and fly fishing mean to them. Before they hit the road to Utah the crew joins in on another conservation event at Payette Brewing Company.

programme.title: Fly Shop Tour
programme.desc: It’s the final leg of the Fly Shop Tour and what better way to end it than with a trip down to see the crew at Fly Fish Food. We learn the unique story of how owners Clark “Cheech” Pierce & Curtis Fry started their shop and spend some time chasing hungry Cutthroat. Wrapping it all up the team puts on the final conservation event of the season with Fly Fish Food and Fish For Garbage, as well as spending some time behind the oars on the Green River with crew at Western Rivers Fly Shop.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: WoodHaven’s Josh Anderson heads to the Western Plains of Kansas in pursuit of a mature whitetail buck. Because of the wide open terrain, a decoy and blind calling can be very affective because of the visibility. After a few well-timed grunts on the Intimidator grunt call, a shooter buck shows up right at the base of the tree!

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Champion caller Scott Ellis is in South Florida Osceola country! They are hunting a small oak head adjacent to an orange grove. The thick cover means you have to be setup perfectly, which is a guessing game and will test your patience. Tons of gobbling and turkey action but Scott has to get sneaky to get this old longbeard to break and come in close.

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
programme.desc: In the wide world of western big game, pronghorn antelope hunting in Wyoming is unmatched in its accessibility and excitement. It’s an active pursuit, typically ripe with plenty of opportunities to spot and stalk black-horned bucks. This makes it an ideal forum for riflemen looking to scratch their western itch.

programme.title: Pure Hunting
programme.desc: Willi and Tom Petry meet in Iowa with good friends, the Wrights to hunt turkeys on their farms. Willi and Tom drew the first season in Iowa and had the first kick at the cat for the spring. They had hunted deer with Cody and Cassie but neither had hunted turkeys in Iowa. They are hoping for a little luck with the gobblers, and they know they are going to have a good time trying.

programme.title: Pure Hunting
programme.desc: Willi spends 8 days chasing a few bucks, but has sights set on “High Beam”. After a few encounters and one on his last morning, he hopes for last minute success on his last afternoon.

programme.title: Bearded Buck
programme.desc: In this episode, Jerry and Austin are joined by Kirk Shebrine and his close friend Scott as they head back to the Cornhusker state to hunt turkeys. They've called in a ton of turkeys over the years but this time they're using a reaping decoy to try to get up close and personal with these Nebraskan long beards. This is a method that they've never tried before and with new methods, comes new challenges.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma getting the Oklahoma turkey season kicked off.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The crew is all at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma kicking of the 2024 Rifle season.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: The crew makes it to Oklahoma. Unfortunately, the weather is not in their favor, but that doesn't slow them down. The morning breaks light, and the crew hears dozens of gobbles.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Spring in Michigan means turkey season is on. In this episode of Winchester Life, the crew returns for Turkey Camp 2025, where changing weather, early mornings, and vocal birds set the tone for the week. After dialing in their setups at the range, the team heads into the field to chase gobblers across hardwoods and open farmland. From patient sits at sunrise to midday moves and carefully planned decoy strategies, each hunt brings new challenges and opportunities. Close encounters, tough conditions, and well-timed shots highlight the grind of spring turkey hunting, as the crew makes the most of every chance in the Michigan woods.
